sentence: The sun shone and as we sat in the boat it seemed we had arrived in Paradise.

Sitting in the boat under the bright sun, it seemed as if we had arrived in Paradise itself.
The settlers here dance what is called a Red River jig.
Here the settlers dance a dance they call the Red River jig.
What the settlers here do is dance something known as a Red River jig.

We must spend an entire winter away — heartbreaking as that is — and it will not be until spring that we can come back to start our new lives at The Forks.

A week ago we settled into our own cabin, and we have kept so busy that I simply cannot stay awake long enough to write at night.
